Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HENRY KHACHATURIAN, CONCORD AUTOMOBILE DEALERSHIP, LLC, TORIAN HOLDINGS'Motion To Compel Arbitration and to staythe litigation Proceedings.

The motion to compel arbitration is CONTINUED to December 7, 2018 to permit plaintiffs the opportunity to file supplemental papers addressing the material newly submitted with defendants' reply brief. Plaintiffs shall file any and all supplemental papers on or before November 30, 2018.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
